name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkTaken(i) == forks[i] = i

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : PhilosopherThinking(i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : PhilosopherHungry(i)
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i)) /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : PhilosopherEating(i)
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: No two philosophers hold the same fork *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<>>

Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = Append(flag, 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>
